first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning in both evaluations is highly positive and focuses on the same key strengths: extensive experience, AI agent infrastructure skills, and a strong core technology stack. The minor differences in the listed concerns are all plausible, skill-based readings of the same resume and fall within the category of normal run-to-run variation. There is no language in the variant evaluation that suggests the change in location from Berlin to Lagos influenced the assessment.
